decisions.title: Canonical Knowledge Architecture — Documents Stored in Repository
decisions.decision_summary: Saiko stores canonical knowledge documents directly in the repository, making them versioned, reviewable, and machine-readable.
assumptions: Repository storage provides stable version control for knowledge artifacts
Markdown with frontmatter enables both human readability and machine indexing
AI systems can access repository content more reliably than external document stores
